mnemonics.title: CGFD Components
mnemonics.content: Cats Get Fish Daily - CLI, GUI, File System, Device Drivers (core interface components)

mnemonics.title: T-V Interface Types
mnemonics.content: Text-Visual = TV - Remember two main interface types like TV channels

mnemonics.title: SHELL Layers
mnemonics.content: System Handlers Execute Low-Level Logic - How shell interfaces with kernel

mnemonics.title: FACE Access
mnemonics.content: File system, API, CLI, Executables - Main access points to OS services

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a command conveyor belt moving text instructions to the OS core
Visualize nested boxes where each box represents a directory containing files
Picture a secure tunnel connecting user space to kernel space
See adapter plugs converting OS signals to device-specific operations
Think of interactive matryoshka dolls - desktop > window > widget > element

analogies.analogy: Like giving precise written instructions to a skilled assistant
Similar to using a car dashboard with visual indicators and buttons
Like using a bank teller to access vault services (kernel resources)
Comparable to a warehouse with labeled shelves and inventory management
